case_title: JAIRO FRANCISCO BARREDA VS. BOB KIMBALL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT KIMBALL, BOB RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT BARREDA, JAIRO FRANCISCO $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $170.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,170.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KIMBALL, BOB AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BARREDA, JAIRO FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT KIMBALL, BOB AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BARREDA, JAIRO FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT -SIGNED SERVED SEP-26-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BARREDA, JAIRO FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (FEE FOR SERVICE $80.00) SERVED SEP-29-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BARREDA, JAIRO FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY BARREDA, JAIRO FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT KIMBALL, BOB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARREDA, JAIRO FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KIMBALL, BOB NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST THE DEFENDANT IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
